title: Friends Don't Kill Each Other
description: Disables the feature to attack villagers (can be enabled on command)
body:
🧑‍🤝‍🧑 Friends Don’t Kill Each Other

> Keep the peace in your village! This mod disables the ability to attack friendly villagers, helping you avoid accidental hits. This mod keeps everyone safe and sound.

🛡️ Features

- Prevents damage to villagers from players

- Toggle protection with a simple command (```/villagerprotection```) for flexibility _(since 1.1 version)_

🤝 Perfect for peaceful gameplay, immersive towns, comfortable gameplay, or family-friendly servers.
